title: Deere & Company Investor Relations
note: Primary investor gateway for Deere financial reports, releases, presentations, and company materials.

title: Deere & Company 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary regulatory source for Deere's business segments, risk factors, fiscal 2025 performance, and profitability context.

title: John Deere Operations Center
note: Official product page for Deere's farm operations, machine, field, and data-management software platform.

title: John Deere Tractors
note: Official product page describing Deere's tractor portfolio across agricultural and utility use cases.

title: Deere & Company Market Cap
note: Point-in-time market capitalization and valuation reference for the S&P 500 top-100 snapshot.

title: Open Source Ecology LifeTrac
note: Open-hardware tractor concept used as a credible but early-stage decentralized machinery alternative.

title: AgOpenGPS
note: Open-source agricultural GPS guidance and autosteer project relevant to tractor retrofit and precision-agriculture decentralization.

title: farmOS
note: Open-source farm-management and recordkeeping platform used as an alternative to proprietary farm data systems.

title: OpenTEAM
note: Agricultural technology ecosystem focused on interoperable, open, farmer-centered tools and data coordination.

title: ISOBlue Open-Source Agricultural Machinery Data Logger
note: Open-source agricultural machinery data-logging project relevant to independent machine telemetry and farmer-owned data workflows.
